app.title: LBO Anonymizer
app.subtitle: Protect sensitive data in your confidential documents

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Protect sensitive data in your confidential documents
login.privacyText: This tool works entirely on your computer. Your files are never sent anywhere unless you explicitly choose to share them. Everything happens right here, in your browser.
login.bulletLocal: Works offline, directly in your browser
login.bulletNoUpload: Your files never leave your computer without your consent
login.bulletNoAccount: No account or personal information needed

landing.badge: Your files stay on your computer
landing.description: Automatically detect and redact sensitive information in PDF documents
landing.footer: Automatic detection powered by artificial intelligence

dropzone.title: Drop your PDF here
dropzone.privacyBadge: Your data never leaves your browser

toolbar.confirmDisabledHint: {{count}}/{{total}} pages processed. Please wait until all pages are processed before confirming.

documents.title: Your Documents
documents.subtitle: View and manage your anonymized documents
documents.emptyHint: Upload and anonymize your first document to see it here
documents.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
documents.viewNotImplemented: Viewing documents is not implemented yet

sidebar.title: Detected Entities
sidebar.subtitle: Click to select, hover to preview

dialogs.removeAllInstances:
Found {{count}} instances of "{{text}}".

Do you want to remove all instances?
dialogs.foundOccurrences: Found {{count}} occurrences of "{{text}}" in the document.
dialogs.annotateAllAs: Do you want to annotate all of them as {{label}}?
dialogs.changeLabelMessage:
Found {{count}} instances of "{{text}}".

Change all to {{label}}?

privacy.title: Your data is protected
privacy.description: No data is sent to the internet. All processing happens directly on your computer.

scope.wholeDocumentDesc: Modify all {{count}} occurrences in this document
scope.allDocumentsDesc: Current document, saved documents, and future ones
scope.futureDocumentsDesc: This document, all saved documents, and future ones

editor.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
editor.selectTextHint: To select text: click a word to start, then click another word to end. Press Esc to cancel.

editorHelp.title: How the editor works
editorHelp.subtitle: Manual anonymization and scope options
editorHelp.selectingStep1: Click a word to set the start of the selection.
editorHelp.selectingStep2: Move the mouse to preview the range.
editorHelp.selectingStep3: Click another word to finish. Press Esc or click outside to cancel.
editorHelp.anonymizeStep1: After selecting, choose the entity type to anonymize.
editorHelp.deanonymizeStep1: Click a highlighted redaction to open actions, then choose Remove.
editorHelp.scopeStep: When asked, you can apply the change to this instance, the whole document, or the whole corpus.

logoutConfirm.title: Log out and delete local data?
logoutConfirm.message:
Logging out will delete all locally saved documents and rules from this browser (IndexedDB) and clear your current session. This cannot be undone.

Do you want to continue?

drop.title: Secure document sharing
drop.subtitle: Share your files confidentially in seconds
drop.dragOrClick: Drag files here or click to browse
drop.notePlaceholder: Briefly describe the documents you are sending...
drop.successMessage: Your files have been received. You can close this page.
drop.securityNote: Encrypted and secure transfer to our private storage

rules.title: Corpus Rules
rules.subtitle: Rules applied across all your documents
rules.suppressedDescription: The AI will never highlight these words, even if it thinks they look like a name or company. Use this when the AI keeps wrongly flagging a common word.
rules.overridesDescription: When the AI finds these words, it will always use the label you picked — ignoring its own guess. Use this when the AI keeps mis-tagging the same name.
rules.forcedDescription: The AI will automatically look for these words in every new document and flag them, even if it would normally miss them.
rules.deleteMessage: Delete the rule for "{{text}}"? Existing saved documents will not be modified.
rules.noRulesHint: Rules added from the editor (corpus scope) will appear here.
rules.futureOnlyWarning: Changes here affect future documents only. Existing saved documents are not modified.
rules.addDuplicate: This text already has a rule.

share.title: Share your anonymized documents
share.subtitle: Your anonymized documents will be sent completely anonymously to help improve our tool. No personal data is collected.
share.reviewFilenamesWarning: Before sharing, make sure none of the document names contain personal information (company name, people's names, etc.).
share.feedbackSubtitle: Did you encounter any bugs, anything unclear, or do you have suggestions to improve the tool? (optional)
share.successMessage: Thank you for your contribution. Your documents have been shared anonymously.
share.errorMessage: An error occurred during upload. Please try again.
share.tooLarge: The document "{{filename}}" is too large to upload (max 4.5 MB).
